title: Terranova
description: Terranova adds new Biomes, animals,blocks,Items and so much more
body:
Terranova Mod – A World Reimagined! 🌍✨

Terranova expands your world with brand-new biomes, each filled with unique plants, wood types, creatures, and exclusive resources. Explore diverse landscapes, encounter new wildlife, and gather fresh materials to enhance your adventure. Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, this mod adds exciting new content to discover!

Features:
✔️ New Biomes – Diverse environments to explore
✔️ New Plants & Wood Types – Unique materials for building and crafting
✔️ New Mobs – Passive and hostile creatures to encounter
✔️ New Resources – Special items and blocks to collect

Current Biomes:
*Redwood Forest
*Lavender Fields
*Shadow Forest
More to come—venture into Terranova and transform your world! 🌿🔮

If you wanna help with this Project contact me on Discord:Lxlennox
